_readme: Every public Young Bull call. price_at_call sources: 'stated' = the price printed in the post itself (the receipt readers saw); 'feed' = Quinn's own priceFetcher capture (price_history table) on the call date; null = no priced in-timeline receipt exists, row is listed unscored. Never Yahoo, never backfilled from third parties, never guessed. Closed calls score to the exit-date price, open calls score to the live quote at refresh time. NOTE 2026-07-13: Quinn flagged that coverage picks are NOT positions (he did not buy CC/INV). The record page was removed the same day it shipped; if a record ever returns, it must separate positions from coverage picks. Entries below marked position:false were never bought.
